programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: The lives of three men changes overnight when they lose all the money they invested in a scam. Now, they must find another way to repay the dreaded loan sharks or face their death.

programme.title: Aan: Men At Work
programme.desc: On a mission to make Mumbai crime-free, DCP Hari Om Patnaik and his team fights against some corrupt politicians and their associates. In the process, their faith in law and order is put to test.

programme.title: Awara Paagal Deewana
programme.desc: A henpecked husband and his father-in-law are intrigued by their new neighbour Gulab Khatri, a recluse and mysterious man. They unwittingly get embroiled in a mafia rivalry when they find out that he's a wanted criminal.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
